TYPO_HANDLING.description: System fails to handle common typos and misspellings

UNSUPPORTED_INTENTS.description: System doesn't handle certain user intent types

SEARCH_MATCHING.description: Search logic fails to match related terms

TIME_PARSING.description: System fails to parse informal time formats

CONTEXT_UNDERSTANDING.description: System loses context or fails to understand references

TH-001.title: Flight typo not recognized
TH-001.user_input: when is my lfight to sf
TH-001.current_response: I don't see any events related to 'lfight' on June 11 to June 18, 2025. Your schedule appears to be clear for this search.
TH-001.expected_response:
Sure thing! Here are the events for June 12, 2025:
- Flight to San Francisco, CA (F9 4593) from 06:08 PM to 07:43 PM. Let me know if you need more details or assistance with anything else!
TH-001.root_cause: No fuzzy matching or typo correction in search logic
proposed_solutions: Add Levenshtein distance checking for common words

UI-001.title: Availability check not supported
UI-001.current_response: Error: I'm not sure how to handle that request. Intent 'availability_check' is not supported.
UI-001.expected_response: Yes, you're free on June 29, 2025. No events scheduled for that day.

SM-001.title: GRE study search mismatch
SM-001.user_input: when does my gre study starts?
SM-001.current_response: I don't see any events related to 'gre study starts, study, starts' on June 11 to June 18, 2025. Your schedule appears to be clear for this search.
SM-001.expected_response:
Sure thing! Here are the events for June 12, 2025:
- Grad prep + essay/tasks from 01:45 PM to 03:45 PM. Let me know if you need more details or assistance with anything else!
SM-001.root_cause: "Grad prep" not matching "gre study" - insufficient semantic matching

TP-001.title: Informal time format rejection
TP-001.user_input: i need you to change that event to 2pm
TP-001.current_response: Error: Failed to create event: Invalid isoformat string: '2:00 PM'
TP-001.expected_response: Event updated successfully. The event is now scheduled for 2:00 PM.
TP-001.root_cause: Time parser doesn't handle informal formats like "2pm"
proposed_solutions: Add dateutil.parser for flexible time parsing

EM-001.title: Birthday event timing failure
EM-001.expected_response: Event updated successfully. "MY BD" is now scheduled for 1:00 PM on December 17, 2025.
EM-001.root_cause: Event modification logic broken for existing events
proposed_solutions: Add better error handling and messages

CU-001.title: Event reference context loss
CU-001.user_input: i cant see the block you made on dec 17
CU-001.current_response:
On Wednesday, December 17, 2025, you have the following events:
- Shadi Bitaraf's birthday (Time not specified)
- 3-4 Leet Q from 09:00 AM to 12:00 PM
- job app from 12:00 PM to 01:15 PM. Enjoy your day!
CU-001.expected_response:
On Wednesday, December 17, 2025, you have the following events:
- MY BD (Time not specified)
- 3-4 Leet Q from 09:00 AM to 12:00 PM
- job app from 12:00 PM to 01:15 PM. Enjoy your day!
CU-001.root_cause: Event title got changed/overridden during creation
